article_title: B.C. Reg. 240/2025 – British Columbia Assessment Authority

briefs.title: Electrical power corporation transmission and distribution line assessed values updated for 2026
briefs.summary: BC Assessment has amended the Electrical Power Corporations Valuation Regulation, updating per-circuit-kilometre assessed values for distribution (Classes 1–4) and transmission (Classes 1–10) lines, effective for the 2026 assessment year.
briefs.action_required: Review your 2026 property assessment notice to confirm updated per-circuit-kilometre values are correctly applied.

key_dates.label: BC Electrical Power Corporations Valuation Regulation 2026 values take effect

briefs.article_title: B.C. Reg. 240/2025 – British Columbia Assessment Authority
